title: Dog Bone/Dumbbell Squeaky Toy – 2-Pack Durable Bone And Dumbbell Shaped Chew Toys for Dogs, Soft and Tough Rubber, Fun Squeaky Sound, Assorted Colours
features: DURABLE DESIGN: Made from tough TPR material with unique geometric diamond pattern texture, these bone-shaped toys are built to withstand regular chewing and play
INTERACTIVE FEATURES: Built-in squeaker adds excitement and engagement during play, encouraging exercise and mental stimulation for your dog
PERFECT SIZE: Each toy measures approximately 22 centimetres in length, ideal for small to medium-sized dogs for carrying, fetching and chewing
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for indoor play and training activities, these toys are excellent for fetch games, solo play, and interactive sessions with your pet
COLOURFUL VARIETY: Available in vibrant colours including turquoise, orange, and grey, adding visual interest to playtime whilst being easy to spot during outdoor use
Includes: Zvire Dog Bone/Dumbbell Squeaky Toy – 2-Pack
description: Product description Discover the perfect playtime companion for your furry friend with this delightful 2-pack of TPR bone-shaped dog toys. Each toy features an eye-catching geometric diamond pattern texture that not only looks attractive but also provides excellent grip and stimulation for your pet. Available in vibrant colours including grey, orange, and turquoise, these durable toys are designed to withstand enthusiastic play sessions. The built-in squeaker adds an exciting interactive element that will keep your dog engaged and entertained. Measuring approximately 22 centimetres in length, these toys are ideally sized for small to medium breeds. The textured surface helps maintain your dog's dental hygiene while they chew, and the dumbbell shape makes it easy for both you and your pet to grip during fetch games. Made from high-quality TPR material, these toys are both fun and safe for your four-legged friend. Perfect for indoor play and suitable for dogs of all life stages, this toy set offers excellent value with two toys in each pack. Hand wash recommended to maintain the toy's quality and longevity. Directions Suitable for all dogs and puppies
